prompt:
Goal: Create a dreamy vertical café advertisement illustration/photo-real anime hybrid for a seasonal shaved ice dessert, with a soft golden summer light and romantic flower-garden atmosphere.

Canvas: Portrait 3:4 composition, warm ivory and honey color palette, shallow depth of field, intricate details, glowing backlight through a rustic window, vintage cottage café interior filled with daisies, lace, dried flowers, and weathered wood.

Main subject: On the right side, show one beautiful young woman with long wavy blonde hair, fair skin, large soft brown eyes, delicate makeup, and a calm wistful expression. She rests her cheek on one hand and holds a gold spoon in the other. She wears a cream lace crochet dress with scalloped cuffs and a floral crown made of small white and pale pink flowers. Her pose is gentle, elegant, and slightly melancholic, looking toward the viewer.

Dessert centerpiece: In the lower center foreground, place exactly one oversized bowl of shaved ice in a clear glass coupe dish on a glass saucer. The shaved ice is pale milk-honey colored with syrup crystals, topped with exactly one round scoop of ice cream, decorated with white daisies, tiny yellow fruit cubes, pale peach mochi-like spheres, mint leaves, and sparkling sugar. Make it look like a fantasy flower-crown honey milk shaved ice.

Visible repeated elements to include: exactly 2 framed signs on the left, exactly 1 small paper tag at the bottom left, exactly 1 gold wax seal near the tag, exactly 1 white rabbit figurine or plush on the lower right, exactly 1 gold spoon in the woman’s hand, exactly 1 glass dessert bowl, and abundant small daisies scattered across the table and frames.

Left upper sign: A large antique cream wooden frame covered with daisies and lace ribbons. Text should read: “CAFÉ Fraise Étoilée” with smaller Japanese text “カフェ・フレーズ・エトワレ”, then the slogan “Blooming with my own light.” Use elegant serif typography.

Left lower menu sign: A smaller antique menu card framed in cream wood with botanical decorations. Include Japanese menu text prominently: “季節限定”, “花冠はちみつのミルクかき氷”, “〜やさしい光に包まれて〜”, followed by smaller ingredient lines, and the price “¥2,200(税込)”. Add a tiny hand-drawn heart in the lower right corner.

Bottom tag: A small beige paper card reading “Blooming with my own light.” with a tiny heart sketch.

Visual style: Hyper-detailed, soft focus, romantic shoujo aesthetic, cottagecore, Parisian-Japanese café menu styling, creamy highlights, sun-drenched atmosphere, translucent lace, realistic dessert texture, delicate botanical ornamentation, high-resolution editorial composition.

Constraints: Keep all text legible where possible, no modern objects, no extra people, no extra animals beyond the single rabbit, no watermark, no harsh contrast. The overall mood should feel like Café Fraise Étoilée serving a magical seasonal dessert called flower-crown honey milk shaved ice.
